hooks.command: $s = git -C 'C:/Users/james/OneDrive/AI/Executive Assistant' status --porcelain; if ($s) { $t = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; git -C 'C:/Users/james/OneDrive/AI/Executive Assistant' add -A; git -C 'C:/Users/james/OneDrive/AI/Executive Assistant' commit -m "Auto-commit: session changes $t"; git -C 'C:/Users/james/OneDrive/AI/Executive Assistant' push }
